// client/src/components/cats/CatsScreen.js
import React from'react';import CatCard from'../ui/CatCard';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CatsScreen=_ref=>{let{cats,activeCats,onActivateCat,onDeactivateCat,playerLevel,maxActiveCats=3}=_ref;const handleActivate=catId=>{if(activeCats.length<maxActiveCats){onActivateCat(catId);}else{alert(`Вы можете активировать максимум ${maxActiveCats} кошек одновременно!`);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"min-h-screen pt-16 pb-20 px-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-6",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-2xl font-bold mb-2",children:"\u041A\u043E\u043B\u043B\u0435\u043A\u0446\u0438\u044F \u043A\u043E\u0448\u0435\u043A"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-gray-600",children:["\u0410\u043A\u0442\u0438\u0432\u043D\u043E: ",activeCats.length,"/",maxActiveCats]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-6",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-xl font-semibold mb-4",children:"\u0410\u043A\u0442\u0438\u0432\u043D\u044B\u0435 \u043A\u043E\u0448\u043A\u0438"}),activeCats.length>0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4",children:cats.filter(cat=>activeCats.includes(cat.id)).map(cat=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CatCard,{cat:cat,isActive:true,onDeactivate:()=>onDeactivateCat(cat.id)},cat.id))}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-center py-8 text-gray-500",children:"\u0423 \u0432\u0430\u0441 \u043D\u0435\u0442 \u0430\u043A\u0442\u0438\u0432\u043D\u044B\u0445 \u043A\u043E\u0448\u0435\u043A"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-xl font-semibold mb-4",children:"\u0412\u0441\u0435 \u043A\u043E\u0448\u043A\u0438"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4",children:cats.map(cat=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CatCard,{cat:cat,isActive:activeCats.includes(cat.id),isUnlocked:cat.unlockLevel<=playerLevel,onActivate:()=>handleActivate(cat.id),onDeactivate:()=>onDeactivateCat(cat.id)},cat.id))})]})]});};
